title: VIDETOL 10 Pcs Stainless Steel Door Stoppers, Heavy Duty Door Stops for Floor, Silver Floor Mounted Door Stops with Screws and Self-Adhesive Pads for Home and Office
features: 👍【HIGH QUALITY】VIDETOL stainless steel door stopper is made of high quality stainless steel, rust and corrosion resistant, stable structure. And it is also equipped with thickened rubber pads with good anti-collision effect, which can effectively cushion the impact of opening the door, reduce the noise and protect the wall and door from damage.

👍【MULTIPLE OPTIONS】The polished oval floor door stops are available in 3M adhesive and screw models, you can install them according to your preference. The first one is to use 3M double sided adhesive to fix the doorstop to the floor, 3M adhesive has super high adhesive strength and can be used for a long time. The second one is to choose the perforated mounting, we have equipped with screws and expansion tubes for you to fix the door stop to the floor, which will make your door stop more durable and stable.

👍【WIDE APPLICATION】The floor mounted door stops can be installed not only on walls or floors, but can also be placed on skirting boards, side tables, wardrobes and other areas that need to be protected from bumps or scratches.
👍【PACKAGE INCLUDE】10 pcs stainless steel door stoppers, 20 pcs screws, 20 pcs expansion tubes, 10 pcs 3M stickers can meet your daily use.

👍【AFTER-SALES SERVICE】VIDETOL brand is very mature and loved by many people, we adhere to the attitude of quality first. If there is any problem about the usage of product or if product is damaged, please contact us, we'll solve your problem as quickly as possible.
